allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/learn/results" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\) | Length: $\($r.Content.Length\) | Has 'Accuracy': $\($r.Content -match 'Accuracy'\)" } catch { "Dev server not running \(expected - build already verified\)" })
